Query.SQL: SELECT W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", W.WARRANT_NUMBER AS "C.WARRANT_NUMBER", 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY AS "C.COURT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "C.COURT_NAME", W.CO_NUMBER AS "C.CO_NUMBER", W.PREISSUE_BALANCE AS "C.PRE_ISSUE_BALANCE", W.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", NULL AS "C.CASE_STATUS", W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.WARRANT_ID", W.WARRANT_TYPE AS "C.WARRANT_TYPE", W.EXECUTED_BY AS "C.WARRANT_EXECUTING_COURT", W.ISSUED_BY AS "C.WARRANT_ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.CO_TYPE" FROM WARRANTS W, COURTS CT WHERE W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER = ${param.localWarrantNumber} AND W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = ${param.owningCourt} AND CT.CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY

SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ W.REP_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'PARTY FOR' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", 1 AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", W.REP_ADDR_1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", W.REP_ADDR_2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", W.REP_ADDR_3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", W.REP_ADDR_4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", W.REP_ADDR_5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", W.REP_POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE", W.REP_DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CP.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", W.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", ''AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM WARRANTS W, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND CP.CODE (+)= W.CODED_PARTY_REP_CODE AND ( ( CP.CODE > 1499 AND CP.CODE < 2000 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) OR ( CP.CODE > 6999 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 0) OR ( CP.CODE > 6999 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) ) UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ W.REP_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'PARTY FOR' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", 1 AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", W.REP_ADDR_1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", W.REP_ADDR_2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", W.REP_ADDR_3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", W.REP_ADDR_4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", W.REP_ADDR_5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", W.REP_POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE", W.REP_DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", NULL AS "C.PARTY_ID", W.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", '' AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", NULL AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND ( W.CODED_PARTY_REP_CODE IS NULL OR W.CODED_PARTY_REP_CODE NOT IN ( SELECT CP.CODE FROM CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE ( (CP.CODE > 1499 AND CP.CODE < 2000 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) OR (CP.CODE > 6999 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 0 ) OR (CP.CODE > 6999 AND CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = 335) ) ) ) UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'PARTY AGAINST' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", 1 AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", W.DEF1_ADDR_1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", W.DEF1_ADDR_2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", W.DEF1_ADDR_3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", W.DEF1_ADDR_4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", W.DEF1_ADDR_5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", W.DEF1_POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CPR.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM WARRANTS W, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+) = W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO (+) = W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER (+) = W.CASE_NUMBER AND P.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ W.DEFENDANT1 AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'PARTY AGAINST' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", 1 AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", W.DEF1_ADDR_1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", W.DEF1_ADDR_2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", W.DEF1_ADDR_3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", W.DEF1_ADDR_4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", W.DEF1_ADDR_5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", W.DEF1_POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CPR.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM WARRANTS W, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+) = W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO (+) = W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER (+) = W.CASE_NUMBER AND P.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ W.DEFENDANT2 AS "C.PARTY_NAME", 'PARTY AGAINST' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", 2 AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", W.DEF2_ADDR_1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", W.DEF2_ADDR_2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", W.DEF2_ADDR_3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", W.DEF2_ADDR_4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", W.DEF2_ADDR_5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", W.DEF2_POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", CPR.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM WARRANTS W, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND W.DEFENDANT2 IS NOT NULL AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE (+) = W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO (+) = W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER (+) = W.CASE_NUMBER AND P.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = CPR.PARTY_ID

SELECT COALESCE(W.WARRANT_AMOUNT, 0) + COALESCE(W.SOLICITOR_COSTS, 0) + COALESCE(W.LAND_REGISTRY_FEE, 0) + COALESCE(W.WARRANT_FEE, 0) - COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = ${param.owningCourt} AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' ), 0 ) AS "C.BALANCE" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID}

SELECT COALESCE(W.PREISSUE_BALANCE, 0) + COALESCE(W.SOLICITOR_COSTS, 0) + COALESCE(W.LAND_REGISTRY_FEE, 0) + COALESCE(W.WARRANT_FEE, 0) - COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = ${param.owningCourt} AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' ), 0 ) AS "C.DEBT" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID}

SELECT DECODE( ${C.CO_NUMBER}, NULL, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(COUNT(*)) FROM CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = 705 AND CE.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ), ${C.CO_NUMBER} ) AS "C.CO_INFO" FROM DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "C.NO_EVENTS" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = ${C.WARRANT_ID} AND WR.RETURN_CODE = '101' AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y'

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "C.MONEY_IN_COURT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = ${param.owningCourt} AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL
